style_prompt: Architectural diagram. Hand-drawn line work, two-tone navy and rust on warm cream paper. Crisp legible labels in English. No photo realism, no people, no logos.
image_prompt: An editorial diagram on warm cream paper, deep navy line work with small rust accents. A single simple robot token at the centre inside a box labelled WORKER. Around it, eight smaller robot tokens arranged evenly in a ring, each labelled with one concern: CYBERSECURITY, QA, CHANGE, CODE REVIEW, INFRASTRUCTURE, COMMUNICATIONS, LEGAL, PRIVACY. Thin arrows point inward from each ring token toward the centre, two of them carrying a small rust tag reading TICKET. A small caption below reads ONE WORKER, EIGHT AUDITORS. Calm, architectural, legible labels. No logos, no people beyond simple tokens.
composed_prompt:
Architectural diagram. Hand-drawn line work, two-tone navy and rust on warm cream paper. Crisp legible labels in English. No photo realism, no people, no logos.

Subject: An editorial diagram on warm cream paper, deep navy line work with small rust accents. A single simple robot token at the centre inside a box labelled WORKER. Around it, eight smaller robot tokens arranged evenly in a ring, each labelled with one concern: CYBERSECURITY, QA, CHANGE, CODE REVIEW, INFRASTRUCTURE, COMMUNICATIONS, LEGAL, PRIVACY. Thin arrows point inward from each ring token toward the centre, two of them carrying a small rust tag reading TICKET. A small caption below reads ONE WORKER, EIGHT AUDITORS. Calm, architectural, legible labels. No logos, no people beyond simple tokens.

The diagram must clearly communicate the structure described. Use crisp legible labels. No watermarks. No photo realism. Architectural diagram aesthetic.
